brand_identity.name: AstroMitra
brand_identity.design_philosophy: Apple-level minimalism meets Luxury Indian spirituality. High contrast, cosmic gradients, deep space aesthetic.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

bento_grid.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8

components.button_primary: relative overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E5B869] to-[#F1D596] text-[#030305] font-medium px-8 py-4 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(229,184,105,0.3)]
components.button_secondary: rounded-full bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/10 text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.1] hover:border-white/20
components.glass_card: relative rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 p-8 overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#E5B869]/30 transition-colors duration-500
components.input_field: w-full bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#E5B869]/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E5B869]/50 transition-all

hero_dashboard_ui.description: Cinematic UI mockup of astrology dashboard. Use in the Hero section floating on the right.

cosmic_background.description: Abstract deep space background. Use as absolute positioned background for Hero and CTA sections with opacity-40 and mix-blend-screen.

zodiac_wheel_feature.description: Glowing golden zodiac wheel. Use in the final CTA section or Features grid.

vedic_glass_ui.description: Modern Vedic astrology motif. Use in the 'Why AstroMitra' section as a visual accent.

sections.name: Announcement Bar
sections.content: AI-Powered Personalized Astrology • Available 24x7 • Instant Guidance

sections.name: Header
sections.styling: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-[#030305]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
sections.brand: Typographic logo using 'Cinzel' font, gold text.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Min-h-screen, Grid 12 cols. Left content (col-span-6), Right Image (col-span-6)
sections.background: Absolute positioning of cosmic_background image with radial gradient overlay fading to background color.
elements: Headline: Your Future. Decoded by AI & Ancient Wisdom.
Subheadline: Body text explaining the value proposition.
CTAs: Primary 'Get Your Astro Reading', Secondary 'Talk to AstroMitra'
Image: hero_dashboard_ui wrapped in motion.div with floating animation.

sections.name: Social Proof
sections.elements: Counters: 10,000+ Readings, 95% Satisfaction, Vedic + Modern AI

sections.name: Why AstroMitra
sections.layout: Grid 4 cols (1 on mobile, 2 tablet, 4 desktop)
sections.cards: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect or border-glow gradients on hover. Pure glass cards.
sections.content: AI-Powered Predictions, Ancient Vedic Wisdom, Personalized Guidance, Instant Clarity.

sections.name: Features Grid
sections.content: Kundali Analysis, Career, Love, Finance, etc. Use vedic_glass_ui in one of the tall bento items.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: Vertical timeline or horizontal steps with glowing golden connectors.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.styling: Glass cards, use Unsplash media URLs for avatars.

sections.name: CTA Section
sections.background: zodiac_wheel_feature as an immense centered background image, opacity-30, mix-blend-screen.
sections.elements: Discover What The Universe Has Planned For You + CTA button.

sections.name: Free Reading Modal
sections.functionality: Multi-step form (Name/DOB -> Focus Area -> AI Reading generation state -> Result)

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: Outfit (300, 400), Cinzel (400, 600), Plus Jakarta Sans (300, 400, 500)
Do NOT use pure #000000, always use the provided background base #030305.
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations (fade_up) and floating effects on images.
Never use raw images without an overlay or gradient blend to ensure text contrast.
Implement the Free Reading Modal as a Shadcn Dialog (or raw Radix dialog/framer-motion modal) customized heavily with the glass_card styles.
Ensure the hero section does not overlap the sticky header by applying proper padding.
Strictly follow the data-testid attributes rule for all buttons and form inputs.
